text: "What is this house."... This is a prophecy that the temple should be cast off.

"He that sacrificeth an ox."... This is a prophecy that the sacrifices which were offered in the old law should be abolished in the new; and that the offering of them should be a crime.—Remembereth incense, that is, to offer it in the way of a sacrifice.
"I Will choose their mockeries"... I will turn their mockeries upon themselves; and will cause them to be mocked by their enemies.
"Before she was in labor."... This relates to the conversion of the Gentiles, who were born, as it were, all on a sudden to the church of God.
